top_signals.title: Crypto market breakout could accelerate as AI trade cools, analyst says
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin topped $67,000 while crypto stocks rallied on optimism over US crypto legislation and signs investors may be rotating out of AI trades.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Hong Kong Brokers Cling to Lunch Break Exchange Wants to Scrap
top_signals.summary: Thousands of stock traders, brokers and other financial professionals in Hong Kong may soon lose their lunch hour — and some aren’t happy about it.

top_signals.title: India opposition leader Gandhi detained after calling for Modi’s resignation
top_signals.summary: Rahul Gandhi said Prime Minister Narendra Modi must resign "for destroying the future of India's youth," before staging a sit-in outside the prime minister's residence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
